description: THE ONLY LIVE SKILL DOCUMENT. Confirmed copy of ~/.claude/skills/forge-4d/SKILL.md. Part I = Pre-Flight (prerequisite, ten gates). Parts II-VIII = the Council Thesis (rocks lifted, the catastrophe, the Law of the Living Edge, the architecture that survives it). Supersedes and replaces every prior skill file including any standalone PRE-FLIGHT.md or earlier forge-4d version.
